title: Somake Blocks
description: A mod that adds decorative blocks.
body:
# SomakeBlocks

**SomakeBlocks** expands your building palette with a massive variety of new decorative and structural blocks, perfect for modern, industrial, and technological builds.

### Key Features:
*   **Tech Blocks:** Futuristic textures in all 16 colors, including matching Slabs and Stairs.
*   **Sheet Metal:** Colorful metallic blocks with Slab and Stair variants, ideal for industrial roofing and walls.
*   **Colored Lamps:** Decorative lighting available in all 16 colors.
*   **Graphene Arrows:** Directional pillar blocks in every color, great for signage and detailed builds.
*   **Industrial Blocks:** Includes Metal Floor, Caution Block, Lead Block, Aluminium Block, and Electrum Block.

### Mod Info
This mod was developed specifically for the **SSMP Somake Server**.
Join the adventure on our official modpack: [Somake Network]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/somake-network](https://modrinth.com/project/smp-somake))
